2380470.name: Iris Online: The World
2380470.description:
Iris Online, a captivating gypsy-themed fantasy MMORPG, offers an impressive array of features. Boasting over 1000 quests, 22 themed instance dungeons, and an intricate Tarot Card system, Iris Online provides an immersive gaming experience with abundant PvE and PvP action. Its charming anime-pop visuals and exquisitely crafted 3D environments grant Iris a distinctive and appealing look.

Within Iris lies the enigmatic Divination System, allowing players to have their Tarot Cards read by a fortune-telling NPC. Delve into the secrets of the mystic arts as the Fortune Teller may bestow buffs and other special enhancements upon your character. Furthermore, through collected Monster Cards, players can instantly transform into various creatures, such as a bouncy and resilient toadstool or a supremely powerful end-game boss. With just a flip of a card, the transformation is complete!
